mapper.sql: id, scene_id, rule_name, logic_type, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, delete_flag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM auth_letter_rule WHERE scene_id = #{sceneId} AND delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY id
SELECT FROM auth_letter_rule WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auth_letter_rule (scene_id, rule_name, logic_type, created_by, created_time, delete_flag) VALUES (#{sceneId}, #{ruleName}, #{logicType}, #{createdBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE auth_letter_rule SET rule_name = #{ruleName}, logic_type = #{logicType}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
UPDATE auth_letter_rule SET delete_flag = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE auth_letter_rule SET delete_flag = 1 WHERE scene_id = #{sceneId}
